message.content: {"analysis":"Training completed with 0.5806 accuracy (below 0.62 target). The unquantized model is 859.7MB (way too large). Quantization is now running. I may need to adjust approach - perhaps use autotune or different hyperparameters.","plan":"1. Wait for quantization to finish. 2.
